title: Revital Advisory Output
description: The structured output produced by Revital's AI advisory engine for a UM case. Every assertion must cite at least one source.

case_id.description: The UM case this advisory was produced for

status.description: complete = all criteria evaluated; partial = some criteria could not be evaluated; abstained = model declined to produce output (e.g. insufficient evidence)

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the advisory was generated

trace_ref.description: Reference to the audit trace record

model_id.description: Model identifier used for inference, e.g. claude-3-7-sonnet-20250219

prompt_version.description: Version of the prompt template used

assertions.description: One assertion per clinical/coverage criterion evaluated

assertion_id.description: Unique identifier for this assertion within the advisory

criterion_ref.description: Reference to the requirement definition, e.g. the requirement_id from Digicore evidence requirements

satisfied.description: True if the model concluded the criterion is met by available evidence

confidence.description: Model confidence in the satisfied determination (0 = no confidence, 1 = full confidence)

citations.description: Supporting citations — at least one is required per assertion. Unenforced citations render the assertion inadmissible.

ref.description: For fhir_resource: FHIR resource reference (ResourceType/id). For document_span: document storage reference.

page.description: Page number within the document (document_span only)

region.description: [x1, y1, x2, y2] bounding box in normalized page coordinates (document_span only)

excerpt_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the cited text excerpt for tamper-evidence (document_span only)

fhir_path.description: FHIRPath expression pinpointing the relevant field within the resource (fhir_resource only)

summary.description: Plain-language summary (1-3 sentences) of how the criterion was evaluated and why the conclusion was reached

not_evaluated_reason.description: If criterion could not be evaluated (e.g. missing evidence), explains why

gaps.description: Evidence or documentation gaps identified during analysis

requirement_id.description: Criterion or evidence requirement that could not be satisfied

description.description: Human-readable description of what is missing or unclear

suggested_action.description: Actionable suggestion for the reviewer, e.g. Request operative report from facility

severity.description: blocking = without this the criterion cannot be met; informational = advisory only

overall_recommendation.description: High-level recommendation synthesized across all assertions. May be null when status == abstained.
